description: The global sticky header appearing on every page. Contains the AbbVie logo, 5 primary navigation items with mega-menu dropdowns, and utility controls (More, Global selector, Search).

layout.structure: Horizontal bar: Logo left, 5 nav items center, utility controls right

FR-01.title: AbbVie Logo
FR-01.description: The header MUST display the AbbVie logo linked to the homepage.
acceptance: Logo image with alt text 'Logo AbbVie'

FR-02.title: Primary Navigation Items
FR-02.description: The header MUST display 5 primary navigation items on desktop.
acceptance: Items: Who We Are, Science, Patients, Join Us, Sustainability
Each item triggers a mega-menu dropdown on click/hover

FR-03.title: Mega-Menu Dropdown
FR-03.description: Each primary nav item MUST open a full-width mega-menu dropdown panel.
acceptance: Contains: category link list, featured story card (image + heading + CTA), dashboard card
Closes on click outside or Escape key
Uses accordion component internally (tabs on desktop, accordion on mobile)

FR-04.title: Utility Controls
FR-04.description: The header MUST include utility controls on the right side.
acceptance: Mobile: Only Search visible next to hamburger

FR-05.title: Mobile Hamburger Menu
FR-05.description: On tablet/mobile, navigation MUST collapse to a hamburger menu.
acceptance: Opens full-screen or slide-in navigation panel
Contains all 5 primary nav items plus sub-navigation

FR-06.title: Sticky Behavior
FR-06.description: The header MUST remain fixed at the top of the viewport on scroll.
acceptance: Header stays visible during page scroll
Does not obscure content (proper spacing/padding on first content section)

FR-07.title: Skip-to-Content Link
FR-07.description: A 'Skip to main content' link MUST be the first focusable element.
acceptance: Hidden visually but accessible to keyboard users and screen readers

FR-08.title: Search Functionality
FR-08.description: The search button MUST open a search input field.
acceptance: Input field with label and submit button

accessibility.AC-01: Navigation MUST use <nav> element with aria-label='Primary'
accessibility.AC-02: Skip-to-content link MUST be the first focusable element
accessibility.AC-03: Mega-menu dropdowns MUST be keyboard navigable (Tab, Arrow keys, Escape)
accessibility.AC-04: Hamburger button MUST have accessible label 'Menu'
accessibility.AC-05: Current page MUST be indicated in navigation (aria-current='page')
accessibility.AC-06: Search input MUST have associated label
